name: Banchoff Park
description: Come play pickleball at Banchoff Park in Ewing Township, NJ! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Community Park
description: Community Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in West Windsor Township, NJ. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Hamilton Area YMCA Sawmill Branch
description: Indoor courts are available fall, winter and spring. No membership. Call for schedule. First come, first serve. Must pay by credit card.

name: Hopewell Tennis and Swim Center
description: Hopewell Tennis and Swim Center is a place to play pickleball in Pennington, NJ. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — PASSES & PACKAGES available, no membership fees

name: Inner Hoops
description: Come play pickleball at Inner Hoops in Trenton, NJ! There are 2 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Mercer Bucks Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Mercer Bucks Pickleball Club in Ewing, NJ! There are 9 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.

name: Mercer County Park Tennis Center
description: Mercer County Park Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in West Windsor, NJ. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: New Jersey Athletic Club
description: New Jersey Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Trenton, NJ. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include locker rooms and lights. Reservations are available.

name: Northern Community Park
description: Come play pickleball at Northern Community Park in Trenton, NJ! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Pennington Ewing Athletic Club
description: Come play pickleball at Pennington Ewing Athletic Club in Ewing, NJ! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. You can reserve the courts.

name: Pickleball Kingdom Hamilton
description:
True Bounce pro-size courts with full ATP capabilities on every court.
Effortless court access — no walking through other courts to get to yours.
A smart, functional layout with clear fencing between courts, so no interruptions from balls rolling in from nearby courts.
Plus, the ability to instantly replay the last point, meaning fewer disputes over line calls and faults, and more actual playing time.

name: Robbinsville Pickle House
description: Robbinsville Pickle House is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Robbinsville Township, NJ. There are 19 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and food.

name: Robbinsville Senior Center
description: Robbinsville Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Robbinsville, NJ. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.
